productDisplayName: Red Tape Men's Black Flip Flop
description: Casual look, stylish touch - that's what these flip flops from red tape have to offer. Perfect for those lazy days, these slippers are all that you need to pamper your feet. Team them with woolen socks on a chilly day for that ultimate in comfort, and simply slide into them on summery days for that cushioned pampering.Upper Leather straps with a toe separator for maximum style and comfort Meshed fabric lining for breathability and to protect the midfoot from blistering Metallic eyelets on the straps, with perforations on the toe separator unit for enhanced ventilation Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Cushioned suede footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Durable and textured PU outsole with multi-directional lugs for maximum grip and traction shoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shineUse a suede brush to dust suede surfaceDo not store in direct sunlight
